260 H1A H1A_BOWEL_CONTRL (H1A) Bowel Continence CHAR 1 Continence in last 14 days: continence self control - bowel continence. 0 = Contenent - Complete control (includes use of indwelling urinary catheter or ostomy device that does not leak urine or stool, 1 = Usually Continent - Bladder, incontinent episodes once a week or less; Bowel, less than weekly, 2 = Occasionally Incontinent - Bladder, 2 or more times a week by not daily; Bowel, once a week, 3 = Frequently
